turns.user_message: I used to be able to shake things off easily, but now small mistakes stick with me all day. It feels like I'm carrying extra weight.
I keep replaying old conversations and cringing at things I said years ago. It's like my mind won't let me forget any slip-up.
I feel permanently stained by every regret, and I don't recognize the lighter person I used to be. The shame has just settled in for good.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be.
